name: Choco-Mint Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large bowl and beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until all of the ingredients are well blended.
2. Pour into a buttered and floured 8x8x2 inch baking pan.
3. Bake on top rack of a 325 degree F oven for 30 to 35 minutes, or until toothpick inserted into center comes out clean.
4. Allow to cool completely before cutting.
